wine_schools.name: Taste Krems Wine Masterclass
wine_schools.address: Stadtgraben 11, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_schools.pricing: Basic EUR 25 (6 wines); Masterclass EUR 55 (8 wines with artisanal foods)
wine_schools.operator: Weingut Stadt Krems and Weingut Stift Göttweig
wine_schools.description: A joint wine education programme run by two historic estates: Weingut Stadt Krems (since 1452) and Weingut Stift Göttweig (since 1083). The Masterclass format uses cellar setting and food pairing to teach Wachau and Kremstal wine classification in 8 comparative pours.
wine_schools.tip: Book via tours@weingutstadtkrems.at; groups welcome and bespoke formats available.

wine_schools.name: Winzer Krems Sandgrube 13 Wein.Sinn Experience
wine_schools.address: Sandgrube 13, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_schools.description: An eight-station immersive cellar experience at the Winzer Krems cooperative, culminating in a 4-D sensory film 'Life in the Vineyard.' Visitors learn the winemaking journey from Grüner Veltliner and Riesling vineyard through to bottle; groups and walk-ins welcome.
wine_schools.tip: Available Monday to Saturday; an accessible introduction to Lower Austrian wine styles suitable for beginners and intermediate wine lovers.

wine_schools.name: Domäne Wachau Guided Cellar Tour & Tasting
wine_schools.program_type: guided production tour with comparative tasting
wine_schools.pricing: EUR 32 per person; includes 4 wines and Wachauer Laberl bread
wine_schools.description: Guided tours of the baroque cellar vaults beneath the Kellerschlössel at Domäne Wachau. Visitors taste the three Vinea Wachau classifications (Steinfeder, Federspiel, Smaragd) in a comparative vertical format; English-language tours run Fridays at 15:00.
wine_schools.tip: Tours run Friday at 14:00 and Saturday at 11:00, April-October; English on Friday at 15:00. Year-round custom bookings via.

wine_schools.name: Nikolaihof Biodynamic Cellar Tour
wine_schools.address: Nikolaigasse 3, 3512 Mautern an der Donau, Austria
wine_schools.program_type: biodynamic viticulture education and cellar tour
wine_schools.description: An in-depth cellar and vineyard tour at Austria's oldest winery, tracing 2,000 years of viticulture from Roman origins to Demeter-certified biodynamic farming by the Saahs family. Back-vintage bottles from the Reserves Cellar illustrate the exceptional ageing potential of biodynamic Wachau whites.
wine_schools.tip: Book directly at wein@nikolaihof.at; pairs with a meal at the Weinstube. The Roman cellar foundations visible in the vaulted cave are a rare archaeological wine-history feature.

wine_schools.name: Vinea Wachau Weinfrühling Producer Tastings
wine_schools.address: Schlossgasse 3, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
wine_schools.program_type: annual open-cellar tasting weekend across 100+ member producers
wine_schools.duration: 2 days (annual event, typically late April / early May)
wine_schools.pricing: EUR 40 wristband covers all participating wineries plus regional transport
wine_schools.description: The annual Wachauer Weinfrühling (Wine Spring) opens over 100 Vinea Wachau member estates in Mautern, Rossatz-Arnsdorf, Dürnstein, Weißenkirchen and Spitz simultaneously. Wristband holders taste current and library vintages directly with winemakers; free Wachau bus, train and ferry transport included.
wine_schools.tip: This is the single best immersive education day in the Wachau; the Steinfeder Night at Schloss Spitz on Saturday evening extends the programme.

wine_schools.name: Weingut Stift Göttweig Experience Cellar Tour
wine_schools.address: Stadtgraben 11, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_schools.program_type: monastery wine history tour with tasting
wine_schools.pricing: Two tour packages available; fees on request
wine_schools.description: The monastery winery Weingut Stift Göttweig offers guided cellar tours tying 900 years of Benedictine viticulture history to the current wine range. Two tour packages combine the experience cellar with comparative tastings of Grüner Veltliner, Riesling and Pinot Noir.
wine_schools.tip: The farm-gate Krems shop (Stadtgraben 11) and the Göttweig abbey itself (Göttweig 1, Furth) both offer self-guided wine sales and tastings without a tour booking.
